description: ILMA Relentless Problem-Solving Policy — Ladder escalation until success or hard blocker

escalation_ladder.name: Read_Current_Trace
escalation_ladder.action: Read current trace file and failure context

escalation_ladder.name: Retrieve_Relevant_Lessons
escalation_ladder.action: Search lesson memory for similar problems

escalation_ladder.name: Search_Internal_Docs
escalation_ladder.action: Search docs/config/code for relevant patterns

escalation_ladder.name: Inspect_Source_Paths
escalation_ladder.action: Read actual source files for context

escalation_ladder.name: Route_Task_Runtime
escalation_ladder.action: Run runtime router to get task type + strategy

escalation_ladder.name: Select_Tools_Skills
escalation_ladder.action: Run tool/skill selector for selected task type

escalation_ladder.name: Generate_Solution_Hypotheses
escalation_ladder.action: Generate at least 3 materially different solution paths

escalation_ladder.name: Run_Safe_Parallel_Validation
escalation_ladder.action: Test hypotheses in parallel if possible (compile, import, unit test)

escalation_ladder.name: Patch_Smallest_Safe_Unit
escalation_ladder.action: Apply patch to smallest safe unit (single function/class/config)

escalation_ladder.name: Run_Targeted_Tests
escalation_ladder.action: Run tests specific to the patched area

escalation_ladder.name: Run_Judge_Evaluation
escalation_ladder.action: Run judge to evaluate if patch solves the objective

escalation_ladder.name: Run_Reflexion
escalation_ladder.action: If judge fails, run reflexion to generate repair plan

escalation_ladder.name: Try_Alternate_Design
escalation_ladder.action: If reflexion suggests different approach, implement it

escalation_ladder.name: Code_Issue_Resolution
escalation_ladder.action: If issue is code-related: compile/import/static scan + targeted patch

escalation_ladder.name: Evidence_Issue_Resolution
escalation_ladder.action: If issue is evidence-related: run evidence validator + fix/capture

escalation_ladder.name: Registry_Issue_Resolution
escalation_ladder.action: If issue is registry-related: run registry validator + update

escalation_ladder.name: Docs_Issue_Resolution
escalation_ladder.action: If issue is docs-related: run doc consistency scan + fix

escalation_ladder.name: Performance_Issue_Resolution
escalation_ladder.action: If issue is performance: run parallel executor/prof probe + optimize

escalation_ladder.name: Route_Tool_Issue_Resolution
escalation_ladder.action: If issue is route/tool: patch router/selector matrix + validate

escalation_ladder.name: Rollback_And_New_Branch
escalation_ladder.action: If repeated failure: create rollback point + try new design branch

escalation_ladder.name: Document_And_Escalate
escalation_ladder.action: If all steps exhausted: document blocker + report to owner/user

evidence_requirements.failed_strategy: must document what was tried and why it failed
evidence_requirements.blocker: must document what makes it unresolvable safely
